name: UNITED GUARDIAN INC
business: United-Guardian, Inc., through its Guardian Laboratories division, manufactures, markets and develops specialty cosmetic, personal care and sexual wellness ingredients and a line of healthcare products including pharmaceuticals and medical lubricants. The company sells cosmetic ingredients through a worldwide network of distributors, pharmaceutical products through full-line drug wholesalers, and medical lubricants directly to manufacturers and marketers of finished medical products.

exposures.sentence: United-Guardian, Inc. ( Company ) is a Delaware corporation that, through its Guardian Laboratories division, manufactures, markets and develops specialty cosmetic, personal care and sexual wellness ingredients and a line of healthcare products including pharmaceuticals and medical lubricants.
Medical Lubricants include a line of hydrogel formulations designed to offer sensory enhancement and lubrication to medical products.

Pharmaceutical Products include an FDA approved prescription drug that is used primarily to prevent and to dissolve calcifications in urethral catheters, as well as a chlorine-based topical antimicrobial.
Sexual wellness ingredients include a line of hydrogel formulations designed to offer sensory enhancement, lubrication and moisturization to sexual wellness applications.

catalysts.sentence: In January 2026, we entered into a new distribution agreement with Brenntag Specialties, a global market leader in chemicals and ingredients distribution, for the distribution of our new Natrajel line of sexual wellness ingredients in the United States, Canada, Mexico, and the distribution of Lubrajel and Natrajel products in France.
In February 2026 we had the product approved by two major PBMs for inclusion on their formularies.
On November 10, 2025 we were certified by DQS Inc. to be in compliance with the requirements of the EFfCI GMP ( Good Manufacturing Practices ) Standards for Cosmetic Ingredients, Revision 2017.
On February 5, 2025, we formally entered into a new marketing and distribution agreement with Azelis Group NV ( Azelis ) to market our products in South Korea.

catalysts.event: Azelis agreement for medical lubricants in UK and Ireland
catalysts.sentence: We entered into a new agreement on February 5, 2025 with Azelis, which gave Azelis the right to market and distribute our medical lubricants in the UK and Ireland.
Our goal is to finalize the contract in the first half of 2026.
